config_use_rule: Use as transformed pattern guidance only; do not copy claims, real-person visuals, or copyrighted clips.

patterns.use: named actor plus high-contrast claim caption
patterns.aino_transform: replace allegation with claim-boundary wording and visible source card

patterns.use: debate/hearing frame with readable quote or comparison caption
patterns.aino_transform: use fictional/illustrative scene or licensed clip plus exact source label

patterns.use: money/number-led caption over public-office or document-like visual
patterns.aino_transform: show source and calculation boundary before judgment

patterns.use: dark title card or news graphic that names the consequence quickly
patterns.aino_transform: build original generated scene plus source card, not fake broadcast screen

patterns.use: oversized CTA can be visible early
patterns.aino_transform: use sparingly; prefer save/share/next-part over subscribe spam

forbidden_direct_copies: copied copyrighted clip as primary asset
